name: Green Tea Oil-Control Gel Cream
positive_review: Feels light under makeup and helps my T-zone look less shiny during the day.
critical_review: It may not be moisturizing enough for dry cheeks in winter.
review_summary: Reviews are strongest around lightweight texture, oil-control finish, and easy daytime use.

name: Ceramide Barrier Repair Cream
positive_review: Helped calm tight skin and made my barrier feel more comfortable overnight.
critical_review: The texture can feel heavy for very oily skin.
review_summary: Reviews highlight barrier comfort, rich hydration, and a better fit for dry or sensitive routines.

name: Mugwort Calming Toner
positive_review: Soaks in quickly and feels calming when my skin looks flushed.
critical_review: The watery texture may feel too simple for users who want strong hydration.
review_summary: Reviews point to a gentle, light toner that works best for calming and layering.

name: BHA Pore Clarifying Liquid
positive_review: Useful for oily areas and clogged pores when used a few nights a week.
critical_review: Can sting or feel drying if my skin barrier is already weak.
review_summary: Reviews are positive for pore care and oil control, but caution against overuse on sensitive skin.

name: Rice Glow Hydrating Serum
positive_review: Gives a soft glow without feeling sticky and layers well with cream.
critical_review: Results for dullness are subtle and take consistent use.
review_summary: Reviews favor glow, hydration, and layering, with more modest feedback on visible brightening.

name: Daily Mild Sunscreen
positive_review: Feels mild and comfortable for daily use when my skin is irritated.
critical_review: May leave a slight cast depending on skin tone and amount applied.
review_summary: Reviews describe a mild daily sunscreen with calming ingredients and some texture tradeoffs.
